message:
🐛 Fix TTFI gate flakiness on shared CI runners (#5009)

Add CI_TOLERANCE_PCT env var (set to 15% in CI workflow) that relaxes
TTFI budgets to account for shared runner variance. Budgets remain
unchanged for local runs. Fixes false positives like demo-warm p95
1006ms vs strict 900ms budget caused by CI runner noise.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -61,6 +61,8 @@ jobs:
         run: npm run test:e2e:perf:ttfi
 
       - name: Compare against baseline (hard fail)
+        env:
+          CI_TOLERANCE_PCT: '15'
         run: node e2e/perf/compare-ttfi.mjs
 
       - name: Upload TTFI artifacts
